definition:
1. a writing  or noting down , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. that which is written, a writing, book: a history, narrative , (Thucydides), etc. 
3. a written contract, a covenant, bond , Lat. syngrapha, (Thucydides); συγγ. ναυτικαί a bond to secure money  lent on bottomry, (Demosthenes Orator); ἀνδριάντα ἐκδεδωκὼς κατὰ συγγραφήν having contracted for its execution, (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
